metadata.title: SYNGO_BP_199
metadata.comment:
Rationale: FMRP knockdown enhances synaptic vesicle exocytosis in presynaptic terminals of DRG neurons via regulating the translation and the surface expression of CaV2.2 channels.

20/2/2017 Pim:
-Fig.4: FRMP promotes proteasomal degradation of CaV2.2 channels
-Fig.8: FMRP knockdown enhances synaptic vesicle exocytosis in presynaptic terminals of DRG neurons via CaV2.2 channels.. Experimental description: P10 DRG neurons were prepared from male Sprague Dawley rats.

20/2/2017 Pim:
Fig.4 uses human cell line (tsa201) that overexpress **rabbit** Cav2.2 (M&M: "The following cDNAs were used: CaV2.2 (D14157)"). The effect of FMRP KD on synaptic transmission is shown in Fig.8 using **rat** DRG neurons. Annotation is against the rat species.

checks.label: OWL Consistency
checks.error_message: No inferences attributed to this model graph in the materializer output. Likely a parse failure or other materializer skip — re-run on this model alone to investigate.
